name: Tiny Tank
short_description: The era of Tiny Tank begins! Tiny Tank is a Classic Hero Shooter, in this game you only have one objective and that is to… SURVIVE! Hold out and battle the hordes of enemies with each wave being harder than the last.
detailed_description:
WARNING!

The game was developed by one person, bugs, an empty world and low fps are possible!


About the Game

Tiny Tank - is an arena horde shooter set in a civil war between the empire and the republic in the 1940s. 

Lore - In the Middle of the second world war the new established Empire has begone it's conquest across the known world! While the empire being's cities to ruin the republic fights back but now you find yourself in the heart of the empire's horde. Fight, upgrade and survive!
